title: centaurea jacea var. lamyi
intro: Centaurea jacea var. lamyi, also known as Lamy's knapweed or mountain knapweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Centaurea jacea var. lamyi include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and infusions in the form of teas, although its use as a medicinal herb is not as widespread due to a lack of scientific research supporting its efficacy.
